content_body: This cabin is absolutely breathtaking. It was clean and meticulously kept. The views were spectacular. Everything we could've needed was in there. It was far enough to cancel out any traffic and noise, but still close enough for a quick run to the grocery store or Red Box. I travel often, and this is easily one of the best getaways I've had. This cabin exceeded my expectations. I would recommend staying here in a heartbeat, and I hope to return soon.
title: Absolutely Breathtaking
